name: CarGurus Automotive Marketplace Data API
what_it_does: CarGurus automotive marketplace REST API for dealerships, automotive lenders, and car technology companies to access vehicle listings, IMV (Instant Market Value) pricing data, dealer inventory management, consumer leads, and automotive market analytics — enabling automated dealership inventory syndication, vehicle pricing intelligence, and consumer matchmaking through CarGurus' US, Canada, UK, Germany, Italy, and Spain automotive marketplaces. Enables AI agents to manage dealer listing for automotive inventory syndication automation, handle IMV price for vehicle market value automation, access lead management for consumer enquiry automation, retrieve price analysis for deal quality scoring automation, manage listing status for inventory availability automation, handle vehicle search for consumer car matching automation, access dealer analytics for performance reporting automation, retrieve finance tool for payment estimation automation, manage CarOffer integration for instant cash offer automation, and integrate CarGurus with DMS, CRM, and automotive technology platforms for end-to-end dealership automation.
use_cases: Syndicating dealership vehicle inventory to CarGurus for automotive marketing automation agents
Accessing IMV (Instant Market Value) pricing data for used car valuation and deal scoring automation agents
Managing consumer car buying leads from CarGurus for dealership CRM automation agents
Getting CarOffer instant cash offer pricing for trade-in and vehicle acquisition automation agents
not_for: Consumer car buying applications (CarGurus API is for dealer and technology partner integrations)
Non-CarGurus-market countries (CarGurus covers US, CA, UK, DE, IT, ES primarily)
Commercial fleet at scale (CarGurus is consumer retail used car marketplace focused)
best_when: A car dealership, automotive technology company, or auto lender wanting AI agents to syndicate inventory, access vehicle pricing data, and manage consumer leads through CarGurus' automotive marketplace in the US and international markets.
avoid_when: DEALER LICENSE REQUIRED: CarGurus dealer API requires active dealer account on CarGurus; automated technology-only API access assumption creates dealer membership required step. IMV PRICING IS REGIONAL: CarGurus IMV (Instant Market Value) pricing is market-specific by geographic area; automated national single-price assumption creates regional price variance; automated must use region-specific IMV for accurate local pricing. LISTING EXPIRY APPLIES: CarGurus listings have activity-based expiry; automated permanent listing assumption creates inactive/expired listings; automated must refresh listing data regularly. CAROFFER IS SEPARATE PRODUCT: CarOffer (instant cash offers) is a separate CarGurus product with its own integration; automated unified CarGurus API for all functions creates missing CarOffer capability; automated must integrate CarOffer separately for instant offer functionality.

auth.notes: CarGurus uses OAuth 2.0 for dealer and partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. Cambridge, MA HQ. Founded 2006 by Langley Steinert. NASDAQ:CGC. Products: Used car marketplace, new car listings, IMV pricing, CarOffer (instant cash offers), finance tools. SDKs: None public. GDPR (UK/EU), CCPA compliant. US, Canada, UK, Germany, Italy, Spain markets. 30M+ monthly visitors. 45,000+ dealers. Competes with AutoTrader and Cars.com for US used car marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for registered dealers; production requires CarGurus dealer account
pricing.paid_tiers: Dealer subscription: monthly fee based on listing package; technology partner: negotiated
pricing.notes: Cambridge MA. NASDAQ:CGC. Dealer subscription. Partnership required for API. Multi-country.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; listing and pricing APIs throttled per subscription tier; webhooks for leads

known_agent_gotchas: IMV IS GEOGRAPHICALLY VARIABLE: CarGurus Instant Market Value pricing varies by geographic market area; automated single national IMV assumption creates regional pricing inaccuracy; automated must pass correct zip code or market area for accurate local IMV

DEALER ACCOUNT REQUIRED FOR API: CarGurus API requires active dealer account; automated standalone developer access creates dealer membership required step; automated integrators without dealer account must pursue technology partner agreement

LISTING DATA FRESHNESS MATTERS: CarGurus applies listing quality scoring based on freshness and completeness; automated infrequent listing updates creates degraded search ranking; automated should push inventory updates at least daily

CAROFFER INSTANT OFFERS ARE SEPARATE: CarGurus CarOffer (instant vehicle purchase offers) has separate integration from marketplace listing API; automated unified CarGurus API assumption creates missing CarOffer functionality; automated must integrate CarOffer API separately

LEAD WEBHOOK RESPONSE TIME AFFECTS QUALITY: CarGurus consumer leads have time-sensitive response windows; automated delayed lead processing creates reduced lead quality and dealer performance score; automated must process leads within CarGurus' recommended response window
agent_readiness.security_notes: Automotive marketplace. CCPA, GDPR, DPPA. OAuth2. US/UK/EU. Vehicle listing and consumer lead data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Automotive marketplace. CCPA, GDPR, DPPA. OAuth2. US/UK/EU. Vehicle and consumer lead data.
